description:
Offered: every third semester
This course presents works by significant ethnic writers, such as James Baldwin, Maxine Hong Kingston, Zora Neale Hurston, M. Scott Momoday, Toni Morrison and Leslie Marmon Silko. Cross-listed with AAST 2650
Prerequisite(s): ENGL 1200
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, DP, LI
